_backup_note: APPLIED + VERIFIED LIVE 2026-06-14. State of SyncView Calendar — Linear Issue Statuses (GP8CSZDNcy5sGdFr) after extending it to also return per-issue meta. Verified by POSTing the sidneylaruel test idents: response carries the unchanged statuses map PLUS meta:{IDENT:{state,isSubIssue,hasDue,hasEditor}} (e.g. VID-12612/Approved -> {isSubIssue:true,hasDue:false,hasEditor:false}). Rollback = linear-issue-statuses.2026-06-14.pre-meta.json. CHANGE: additive — still returns {ok, statuses:{IDENT:stateName}} exactly as before (existing on-load reconcile unaffected), PLUS the meta map. The calendar uses meta to show the 'incomplete sub-issue' banner on Approved/Posted cards too (those issues are excluded from the workload feed). Project is intentionally NOT returned: a card on a client calendar already belongs to a client and the workload feed resolves the project via a client mapping, so the FE treats project as present to stay consistent with in-progress cards. Restore the real Linear key in place of [REDACTED-LINEAR-KEY] if re-importing. Read-only workflow; not on the dual-write list.
name: SyncView Calendar — Linear Issue Statuses
